category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Canadian federal energy, refrigerant, bilingual labelling, and electrical safety requirements.

target_market_label.zh: 加拿大（NRCan / EnerGuide / CSA电气安全）
target_market_label.zht: 加拿大（NRCan / EnerGuide / CSA電氣安全）

title.en: China-to-Canada Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入加拿大：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入加拿大：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Canadian NRCan Energy Efficiency Regulations, EnerGuide labelling, CSA/SCC electrical safety certification, ODSHACR refrigerant controls, and English/French bilingual labelling expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与加拿大NRCan能效法规、EnerGuide标签、CSA/SCC电气安全认证、ODSHACR制冷剂管控及英法双语标签要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與加拿大NRCan能效法規、EnerGuide標籤、CSA/SCC電氣安全認證、ODSHACR製冷劑管控及英法雙語標籤要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SCC-accredited certification-body assessment, customs determination, provincial electrical approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Canadian federal regulations, provincial/territorial electrical-safety rules, CSA/SCC certification pathways, refrigerant controls, and bilingual labelling obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or sale.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SCC认可认证机构评审、海关裁定、省/地区电气批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或销售前，应与合格专业人士核验现行加拿大联邦法规、省/地区电气安全规则、CSA/SCC认证路径、制冷剂管控及双语标签义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SCC認可認證機構評審、海關裁定、省/地區電氣批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或銷售前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行加拿大聯邦法規、省/地區電氣安全規則、CSA/SCC認證路徑、製冷劑管控及雙語標籤義務。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face five major Canada compliance gaps: (1) NRCan Energy Efficiency Regulations, 2016 minimum energy performance requirements and reporting before import or interprovincial shipment; (2) required Canadian EnerGuide household appliance label content and format; (3) Canadian electrical product certification/approval through an SCC-accredited certification body to applicable CSA C22.2 standards such as CSA C22.2 No. 63 and CSA C22.2 No. 120, where applicable; (4) refrigerant and HFC controls under Canada's Ozone-depleting Substances and Halocarbon Alternatives Regulations; and (5) English/French bilingual consumer labelling and documentation. Chinese CCC, GB 4706.13, and GB 12021.2 files help technical preparation but do not replace Canadian regulatory filings, Canadian energy labels, or Canadian electrical approval marks.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临五大加拿大合规差距：（1）NRCan《2016年能效法规》的最低能效要求及进口或跨省运输前报告；（2）加拿大家用电器EnerGuide标签的内容和格式；（3）通过SCC认可认证机构按适用CSA C22.2标准（如适用的CSA C22.2 No. 63和CSA C22.2 No. 120）完成加拿大电气产品认证/批准；（4）加拿大《消耗臭氧层物质和卤代烃替代物法规》下的制冷剂及HFC管控；（5）英法双语消费品标签和文件。中国CCC、GB 4706.13和GB 12021.2资料有助于技术准备，但不能替代加拿大法规申报、加拿大能效标签或加拿大电气批准标志。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨五大加拿大合規差距：（1）NRCan《2016年能效法規》的最低能效要求及進口或跨省運輸前報告；（2）加拿大家用電器EnerGuide標籤的內容和格式；（3）通過SCC認可認證機構按適用CSA C22.2標準（如適用的CSA C22.2 No. 63和CSA C22.2 No. 120）完成加拿大電氣產品認證/批准；（4）加拿大《消耗臭氧層物質和鹵代烴替代物法規》下的製冷劑及HFC管控；（5）英法雙語消費品標籤和文件。中國CCC、GB 4706.13和GB 12021.2資料有助於技術準備，但不能替代加拿大法規申報、加拿大能效標籤或加拿大電氣批准標誌。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, SCC-accredited certification body, Department of Justice Canada legal source, NRCan, or CSA Group source preferred. Local PDFs not accepted. Justice Laws, NRCan, and CSA Group are preferred Canadian sources for this dataset.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
